ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program entry */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market */,
  "credit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the market accepts credit */,
  "wic" INTEGER /* Indicates if the market accepts WIC */,
  "wic_cash" INTEGER /* Indicates if the market accepts WIC cash */,
  "sfmnp" INTEGER /* Indicates if the market participates in the Senior Farmers' Market Nutrition Program (SFMNP) */,
  "snap" INTEGER /* Indicates if the market accepts SNAP */,
  "organic" INTEGER /* Indicates if the market offers organic products */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* List of certifications */,
  "community_programs" TEXT /* List of community programs */,
  "funding_sources" TEXT /* List of funding sources */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendor_market" (
  "vm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vendor-market relationship */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the vendor joined the market */,
  "leave_date" TEXT /* Date when the vendor left the market (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., market manager, vendor, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the information */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of entity being accessed (e.g., market, vendor) */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the information was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes the review has received */,
  "verified_visitor" INTEGER /* Indicates if the reviewer is a verified visitor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendor_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes the review has received */,
  "verified_buyer" INTEGER /* Indicates if the reviewer is a verified buyer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vendor_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "visitor_count" INTEGER /* Number of visitors to the market */,
  "total_transactions" INTEGER /* Total number of transactions at the market */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales amount at the market */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating given by visitors during the visit */,
  "feedback_summary" TEXT /* Summary of visitor feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendor_sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of product sold */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the sale */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  "customer_feedback" TEXT /* Customer feedback on the sale */,
  "verified_transaction" INTEGER /* Indicates if the transaction is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id")
)
